name_en: 【New】Model: 837467. This Gucci SoftBit series shoulder bag features a large half-horsebit design, a brand classic equestrian style accessory.
name_cn:
【New】Model: 837467. This Gucci SoftBit series shoulder bag features a large half-horsebit design, a brand classic equestrian style accessory.
Brown grained calfskin
Light gold-tone hardware
Dark brown microfiber lining
Half-horsebit
Fits Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, long wallet, and lipstick
Handle height: 15cm
Magnetic closure
Dimensions: 27.5cm (W) x 21cm (H) x 16cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.6kg
Color: Brown full leather/Original leather.
Made in Italy
